summary: A PIP2 assessment tool with expanded resources, printable/exportable summary feature, and a donation section with PayPal QR code in the footer.
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Crop to the QR code card area only, removing the surrounding light-blue background and large whitespace, keeping the PayPal label beneath the code (pp_my_qrcode_1772217875112.jpg > paypal-qr-danielle-boylan.dim_300x300.png)

existing_features.title: Add a donation section to the site-wide Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) that displays the uploaded PayPal QR code image (stored as frontend/public/assets/generated/paypal-qr-danielle-boylan.dim_300x300.png), the name 'Danielle Boylan', a short friendly message encouraging users to support the tool (e.g. 'If this tool helped you, consider buying me a coffee ☕'), and a label reading 'Scan to donate via PayPal'. The section should appear above the existing footer content and be visually distinct but consistent with the app's design system.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add printable/exportable summary of drafted PIP2 answers and evidence list
Add donation section with PayPal QR code in the footer of every page
